selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 1.3% and 20-day momentum is 14.5%.
Trend quality is supported by 60% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 4.1% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 1.8%, downside volatility near 1.4%, and a recent max drawdown of 3.6%.
Volume confirmation is -7.4% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 2.0% versus SPY over 5 days and 2.1% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.86, confidence 0.85, and 1.1 weighted articles across 5 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.86, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 6 articles across 5 sources, 1.1 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.79, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.85.
Broad market news leaned bullish for the Healthcare sector with score 0.57 and confidence 0.45.

Eli Lilly's acquisition of AtaiBeckley for up to $3.8B is a material strategic bet on psychedelic therapeutics. Near term this should boost sentiment toward large-cap pharma and specialty drug developers working on novel CNS indications (positive for healthcare sector equity flows). The deal raises expectations around future revenue/R&D synergies for Lilly specifically (not a tracked symbol here) and may lift comparable biotech names; regulatory and clinical-readout risk remains. No direct impact on DHR.
Sector overlay was trimmed by 45% because it overlaps with company or macro themes.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC -0.01).
Overall model score is 0.191 with high confidence.

news_evidence.title: Danaher stock remains supported by earnings and margins
news_evidence.llm_reason: Directly discusses Danaher's recent financials (2025 revenue and strong adjusted operating margin) and investor focus on core revenue re-acceleration. This is company-specific context that supports sentiment but does not introduce a clear near-term catalyst beyond reiterating strengths and risks.

news_evidence.title: Danaher Q2 2026 earnings preview
news_evidence.llm_reason: Earnings preview for Danaher ahead of Q2 2026—relevant for short-term trading around the report but contains no new data or analyst revisions that would materially change the outlook by itself.

news_evidence.title: Danaher (DHR) Q2 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
news_evidence.llm_reason: More detailed Q2 earnings preview citing expected ~2.8% revenue growth and contextualizing prior EPS beat and sector sentiment. Raises probability of earnings-driven moves this week but remains a preview, not new results or guidance changes.
